parameters.name: list_customers
parameters.description: List recent customers. Parameters: limit (optional default 10).

parameters.name: search_customers
parameters.description: Search customers with Stripe search syntax. Examples: email:"x@y.com", name:"Acme", metadata["order_id"]:"123". Parameters: query (required), limit (optional).

parameters.name: get_customer
parameters.description: Get a customer by id. Parameters: customer_id (required, cus_...).

parameters.name: create_customer
parameters.description: Create a new customer. At least one of name/email required. Parameters: name, email, phone, description (all optional but at least one required).

parameters.name: update_customer
parameters.description: Update fields on a customer. Parameters: customer_id (required), name/email/phone/description (any subset).

parameters.name: list_payments
parameters.description: List PaymentIntents (modern payment flow). Parameters: limit (optional), customer_id (optional filter).

parameters.name: get_payment
parameters.description: Get a PaymentIntent by id. Parameters: payment_id (required, pi_...).

parameters.name: list_charges
parameters.description: List charges (legacy — still populated alongside PaymentIntents). Parameters: limit, customer_id (optional).

parameters.name: list_invoices
parameters.description: List invoices. Parameters: limit, customer_id (optional), status (optional: draft, open, paid, void, uncollectible).

parameters.name: get_invoice
parameters.description: Get invoice by id. Parameters: invoice_id (required, in_...).

parameters.name: create_invoice
parameters.description: Create a DRAFT invoice for a customer. Line items must be added separately via the Stripe dashboard or API. Parameters: customer_id (required), description (optional), days_until_due (optional).

parameters.name: list_subscriptions
parameters.description: List subscriptions. Parameters: limit, customer_id (optional), status (optional: active, canceled, past_due, trialing, all).

parameters.name: get_subscription
parameters.description: Get subscription by id. Parameters: subscription_id (required, sub_...).

parameters.name: cancel_subscription
parameters.description: Cancel a subscription IMMEDIATELY. On live mode this stops recurring billing — confirm with user before calling. Parameters: subscription_id (required, sub_...).

parameters.name: list_products
parameters.description: List products. Parameters: limit, active (optional, default 'true'; set 'false' to show archived).

parameters.name: list_prices
parameters.description: List prices. Parameters: limit, product_id (optional filter), active (optional).

parameters.name: list_refunds
parameters.description: List refunds. Parameters: limit, charge_id (optional), payment_intent_id (optional).

parameters.name: create_refund
parameters.description: Refund a charge or payment_intent. On LIVE keys this moves real money — confirm with user before calling. Parameters: charge_id OR payment_intent_id (one required), amount (optional, minor units e.g. 500 = €5.00; omit for full refund), reason (optional: duplicate, fraudulent, requested_by_customer).

parameters.name: get_balance
parameters.description: Current Stripe account balance (available + pending per currency). No parameters.

parameters.name: list_balance_transactions
parameters.description: List balance transactions (net amounts after Stripe fees — actual money movement). Parameters: limit, type (optional: charge, refund, payout, adjustment, fee, ...).

parameters.name: list_payouts
parameters.description: List payouts to your bank account. Parameters: limit (optional).

parameters.name: list_disputes
parameters.description: List chargebacks and disputes. Parameters: limit (optional).

parameters.name: create_payment_link
parameters.description: Create a reusable hosted checkout URL for a given Stripe price. Great for quick invoicing. Parameters: price_id (required, price_...), quantity (optional default 1).
